notes: FDC Foundation entry 2646170 (raw, boneless, skinless). Input file reports 165 kcal / 3.6g fat — these match a *cooked* value, not raw. Expect MAJOR_DISCREPANCY on kcal and fat. Sat-fat filled from SR Legacy 171477.

FDC Foundation entry 2710824 (Hass avocado, raw). Input file has fat=4.5g — this is a *planted major error* (real fat is ~20g). Expect MAJOR_DISCREPANCY on fat and kcal. Sat-fat and sugars filled from SR Legacy 09037.

FDC Foundation entry 2346396 (rolled oats, dry). Input file reports 240 kcal / 42g carbs — these are roughly *half* the real values, a MAJOR discrepancy (possibly per-serving values mislabelled as per-100g). Sat-fat from SR Legacy 08120.

FDC Foundation entry 748967 (whole egg, raw). Input file reports 155 kcal / 11.0g fat / 13.0g protein — within 5–10 % on most nutrients. Expect MINOR_DISCREPANCY overall (kcal ~5 % high, fat ~10 % high).

FDC Foundation entry 747447 (broccoli, raw). Input file reports 34 kcal / 2.8g protein / 7.0g carbs — all within ~10 % of USDA values. Expect MINOR_DISCREPANCY (carbs ~12 % high) or MATCH depending on thresholds.
FDC Foundation entry 1105314 (banana, raw, without peel). Input file reports 106 kcal / 27g carbs — kcal ~9 % high and carbs ~17 % high. Expect MINOR_DISCREPANCY (kcal) shading toward MAJOR on carbs.

SR Legacy entry 171265 (fluid whole milk, 3.25 % milkfat). Input file values are close to reference — all key macros within ~3 %. Expect MATCH. Sugar slightly exceeds carbs in the SR Legacy entry due to rounding; treat as data quirk.
SR Legacy entry 169426 (almonds, dry roasted values align; raw values consistent). Input file values are accurate — all macros within 2 % of reference. Expect MATCH.

FDC Foundation entry 2684441 (Atlantic salmon, farmed, raw). Input file reports fat=5.2g — this is a *planted major error*; farmed Atlantic salmon is a high-fat fish averaging 13–15g fat/100g raw. Expect MAJOR_DISCREPANCY on fat and kcal. NOTE: fat content varies materially between farmed and wild-caught Atlantic salmon (farmed ~13g, wild ~8g/100g raw); this entry reflects USDA farmed figures.

Values derived from the Fage USA label (240g container: 133 kcal, 24g protein, <0.5g fat, 9g carbs / sugars, 85mg sodium) normalised to per-100g. Input file has protein=5.5g — this is a *planted major error* (real value ~10g/100g). Expect MAJOR_DISCREPANCY on protein. BARCODE NOTE: barcode 5200435000027 returns HTTP 404 on Open Food Facts; the verifier agent must fall back to search_off_by_name or web search and cite the Fage official page.

SR Legacy entry 172686 (white bread, commercially prepared). Input file reports 198 kcal — ~34 % below the reference (265 kcal); this is a *planted major error*, possibly a per-slice value mislabelled as per-100g. Expect MAJOR_DISCREPANCY on kcal and carbs.
